Admin permission
Admin role has access to the Admin ST page
St Widget contains "Edit" button, "Delete" button & "Create Page" button is present on ST Admin page for Admin role
View mode of the "/qa-not-delete-st-page" structure page is available for the Admin role
Admin role can duplicate the structure page
Admin role can edit the structure page
Admin role can delete the structure page on the ST page
Admin role is allowed to publish structure pages
Admin role has access to SEO modal on the structure pages
Admin role can upload a video to CDN on the structure pages
Admin role can upload an image to CDN on the ug page
Check API admin permission
Internal Writer permission
Internal Writer role has NO access to the Admin ST page
Internal Writer role has NO access to the control panel
Check API Internal Writer permission
Game Manager permission
Game Manager role has access to the Admin ST page
St Widget contains only "Edit" button & "Create Page" button is missing on ST page for Game Manager role
View mode of the "/qa-not-delete-st-page" structure page is available for the Game Manager role
Game Manager role can't publish ST pages
Game Manager role can't archive, duplicate ST pages
Game Manager has access to SEO modal on the structure pages
Game Manager can upload a video to CDN on the structure pages
Game Manager role can can upload an image to CDN on the ug page
Check API Game Manager permission
